actions.title: Rampball 35
actions.parent_description:
The unpredictable tilting and rotating behavior of the Rampball challenges the user’s balance skills and triggers creative movement. Rampball® balance balls are suitable for playing, exploration and balance training.

The Rampball® has an extra strong spring system that makes it tilt to the sides. The 50R/70R-models are also equipped with a ball bearing that allows them to rotate around vertical axis.

Tilting balance ballDiameter 35 cmHeight 36 cmWeight 27 kgTilts 5 cm in all directionsFall height 36

Tilting balance ballDiameter 50 cmHeight 51 cmWeight 66 kgTilts 10 cm in all directionsFall height 51

Tilting and rotating balance ballDiameter 50 cmHeight 51 cmWeight 75 kgTilts 10 cm in all directionsFall height 51

Tilting and rotating balance ballDiameter 70 cmHeight 70 cmWeight 201 kgTilts 15 cm in all directionsFall height 70

Artificial grass/wet pour ground covers (rubber/cork etc.)

Grass/loose-fill covers (wood chips, sand etc.)

actions.title: Jumpstone 27
actions.parent_description:
The spring attached Jumpstone™ gives a delightful response to the user. When jumping from pad to pad it triggers an exciting and creative play that challenges speed and balance. The modest height makes it safe, even for young children, to make huge leaps and run at high speed.

Jumpstone™ natural rubber jump pads with a rough surface. The Jumpstone is popular for a wide age range.

Jumpstone™ 27
Diameter: 27 cm
Height: 18 cm
Weight: 8 kg

Jumpstone™ 50
Diameter: 50 cm
Height: 18 cm
Weight: 20 kg

Artificial grass/wet pour covers (cork or rubber)

Grass/loose-fill ground covers (wood chips, sand, etc.)

Suggested distances between Jumpstones (center to center)

The links will open Google Drive folders where you can choose to download the desired product variant.
